title: ESTIMATION OF CAROTENE IN GREEN VEGETABLES BY THE HILGER-SECTOR PHOTOMETER.
author: BHUPAL CHANDRA RAI-SIRCAR
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Carotene content of some thirteen varieties of green vegetables has been determined by the sector-photometric method. Pure  \(\beta\) -carotene was taken as the standard. The extraction was done according to a method more or less similar to the procedure followed by Smith, by Schertz and by Wilson, Das-Gupta and Ahniad.
steps_raw: Carotene content of some thirteen varieties of green vegetables has been determined by the sector-photometric method. Pure  \(\beta\) -carotene was taken as the standard. The extraction was done according to a method more or less similar to the procedure followed by Smith, by Schertz and by Wilson, Das-Gupta and Ahniad.
